intentSynonyms: fetch a single followers in tiktok
view one specific followers in tiktok
get followers of a user in tiktok
description: Get the list of followers for a TikTok user. Requires the user's secure user ID (secUid). Use get_user_profile to find a user's secUid from their username. Supports cursor-based pagination.

username.description: Username to look up secUid (alternative to providing sec_uid directly)

sec_uid.description: Secure user ID (secUid) — use get_user_profile to find this

cursor.description: Pagination cursor (maxCursor from previous response, default 0)
